title: cyperus cayennensis var. redolens
intro: Cyperus cayennensis var. redolens, also known as redolent umbrella sedge, is a plant species within the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that is native to tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus cayennensis var. redolens include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce pain. Herbal preparations of Cyperus cayennensis var. redolens can be made from its roots, which are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures.
